authority: temporary extracted CC Switch source, a loopback archive server, disposable fixture data, and exact cleanup of agent-created live fixture residue; no authority for a real Skill migration, upstream write, consumer configuration change, commit, or push
diagnosticTestSeams: the prior five Skill-service home lookups remain routed through config::get_home_dir in the temporary source copy
get_app_config_dir gives explicit CC_SWITCH_TEST_HOME precedence over the Windows legacy HOME database fallback
CC_SWITCH_TEST_SKILL_ARCHIVE_BASE_URL redirects GitHub-compatible archive requests to a loopback server
CC_SWITCH_TEST_FAIL_UPDATE_AFTER_REMOVE injects a failure after old SSOT removal and before new source copy

successPathAssertions: v1 installs from the controlled source archive into the selected SSOT
v2 produces one content-hash update signal
updating creates a readable v1 backup before replacing the SSOT with v2
the database hash and metadata advance to v2
uninstalling v2 and restoring the v1 backup recovers the v1 hash and files
failurePathAssertions: an injected post-remove copy failure surfaces to the caller
the old SSOT directory is absent after the failure
the old database row remains after the failure
removing the stale row through uninstall and restoring the backup recovers v1

confirmedProductGap.possibleFailureState: SSOT directory missing while the old database row remains
confirmedProductGap.judgment: CC Switch remains usable for source management, but its current update path must not be treated as a transaction or sufficient rollback proof

isolationIncidentAndCleanup.incident: diagnostic tests run before the isolation correction temporarily wrote test-only Skill, source, SSOT, and backup artifacts to the real CC Switch store
isolationIncidentAndCleanup.rootCause: on Windows, get_app_config_dir used the legacy HOME database fallback when the disposable database did not yet exist, overriding the explicit CC_SWITCH_TEST_HOME expectation
isolationIncidentAndCleanup.cleanupSafety: both cleanup transactions required exact test identity and metadata matches; the first also required exact directory and backup metadata, while the database-only correction aborted if any payload directory existed

preCleanupDatabaseBackups.coveredResidue: fixture/skills:skills/demo plus its SSOT and three backups

requiredBeforeState: stop or quiesce CC Switch writes and capture a consistent database backup
capture exact hashes and ownership for the selected live Skill, SSOT, projections, and existing backups
bind one exact reviewed source revision and expected Skill tree
verify the pre-change backup is readable outside the update code path
requiredExecutionBoundary: explicit preview of database, SSOT, projection, and source-ownership transitions
abort on any unexpected foreign ownership, directory collision, or live-state drift
requiredFailureRecovery: do not rely on update_skill as an atomic transaction
if replacement fails after deletion, remove only the stale fixture or canary record after exact identity verification
restore the verified pre-change backup and re-check hashes, projections, and database ownership
retain the pre-change database backup until post-state acceptance

nonActions: no real user Skill was migrated, replaced, updated, disabled, or restored
no Hook, MCP, Plugin, App, AGENTS, rules, or consumer configuration change
no upstream issue or pull request
no cross-repository write, commit, or push
